# Beauty Sleep Studio PDX

> Portland's premier lash extension, lash lift, and brow lamination studio in the Nob Hill neighborhood. Licensed esthetician Haley has been perfecting lashes since 2008.

## Location
1308 NW 20th Ave, Suite 4, Portland, OR 97209
Nob Hill / Northwest Portland
Google Maps: https://www.google.com/maps?q=1308+NW+20th+Ave+Suite+4+Portland+OR+97209

## Contact
- Phone: 928-499-1270 (call or text)
- Email: beautysleepstudiopdx@gmail.com
- Book online: https://square.site/book/DYKA7NPF92BP7/beauty-sleep-studio-portland-or
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/beautysleepstudiopdx
- Website: https://www.beautysleepstudiopdx.com

## Hours
Tuesday–Friday: 10:00am–8:00pm
Monday, Saturday, Sunday: Closed

## Services & Pricing
- Classic Lash Extensions (full set): $180 — fills from $80
- Hybrid Lash Extensions (full set): $210 — fills from $90
- Volume Lash Extensions (full set): $260 — fills from $120
- Lash Lift + Tint: $100 (lasts 6–8 weeks)
- Lash Lift Only: $85 (lasts 6–8 weeks)
- Lash Tint Only: $30 (lasts up to 4 weeks)
- Brow Lamination: Available (ask in booking notes, lasts up to 6 weeks)

- Studio hero: https://www.beautysleepstudiopdx.com/images/hero.jpg
- Portfolio (classic lash extensions): https://www.beautysleepstudiopdx.com/images/portfolio-classic.jpg

- Portfolio (hybrid lash extensions): https://www.beautysleepstudiopdx.com/images/portfolio-hybrid.jpg

- Haley (esthetician portrait): https://www.beautysleepstudiopdx.com/images/haley.jpg

## About
Haley is a licensed esthetician since 2008 with nearly two decades of experience specializing in lash extensions, lash lifts, and brow lamination in Portland, Oregon. She customizes every set to her client's unique eye shape and personal style.

## Service Area
Portland metro: Nob Hill, Pearl District, Downtown, NE Portland, SE Portland, Beaverton, Lake Oswego, Tigard, West Linn, Hillsboro, Gresham, Oregon City, Milwaukie, Clackamas, Vancouver WA
